item.name: REPO-EXISTENCE-HIDING-PARITY — Absent repo → byte-identical "repository not found" across Get/Delete/ListReferrers (uniform existence-hiding, security.md #6)

exec: pm.test('Get absent → repository not found', () => pm.expect(pm.environment.get('repoMissMsg')).to.eql('repository not found'));
pm.test('Delete absent byte-identical to Get miss', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.eql(pm.environment.get('repoMissMsg')));
pm.test('ListReferrers absent byte-identical to Get miss', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.eql(pm.environment.get('repoMissMsg')));
